summary: JG12 Iteration 18 - Admin Dashboard with real metrics fully verified. Backend: All 16 API tests pass (dashboard-stats, upcoming-payments, legacy dashboard, auth protection). Frontend: All 12 features verified (5 KPI cards, plan distribution bar, upcoming payments section, client list, navigation).
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Admin login returns token with admin/trainer role
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard-stats returns all KPI fields (total_clients, active_clients, at_risk_clients, inactive_clients, mrr, plans)
✅ Backend: dashboard-stats plans object has gold, silver, bronze, elm counts
✅ Backend: dashboard-stats values match expected (4 total, 4 active, 0 risk, 496€ MRR)
✅ Backend: dashboard-stats plan distribution correct (gold=2, silver=2)
✅ Backend: dashboard-stats requires admin auth (rejects client token with 403)
✅ Backend: dashboard-stats rejects no auth (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/upcoming-payments returns structure with upcoming array and total
✅ Backend: upcoming-payments items have name, plan, price, next_payment fields
✅ Backend: upcoming-payments returns 0 items (dates in past as expected)
✅ Backend: upcoming-payments requires admin auth (rejects client token)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard (legacy) still works with backwards compatibility
✅ Backend: legacy dashboard has clients_by_plan alias
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/clients returns 4 clients with user data
✅ Backend: admin clients have user object with name and email
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with data-testid='admin-dashboard'
✅ Frontend: KPI row shows 5 cards (kpi-total, kpi-active, kpi-risk, kpi-bajas, kpi-mrr)
✅ Frontend: KPI values match backend (4 total, 4 active, 0 risk, 0 bajas, 496€ MRR)
✅ Frontend: Plan distribution bar shows Gold 2 (yellow) and Silver 2 (gray) with correct colors
✅ Frontend: Próximos cobros section shows '0' badge and 'No hay cobros programados' message
✅ Frontend: Client list shows 4 clients with name, email, plan badge, status
✅ Frontend: Click on client row navigates to /admin/clients/{id}
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py: dashboard-stats correctly calculates MRR from active client prices (sum of price field)
admin.py: at_risk logic correctly checks week>=3 AND no report in 14 days
admin.py: upcoming-payments correctly filters by next_payment date range (now to +7 days)
admin.py: legacy dashboard endpoint correctly delegates to dashboard-stats for backwards compatibility
AdminDashboard.jsx: KpiCard component properly uses data-testid for all 5 cards
AdminDashboard.jsx: Plan distribution bar uses correct colors (gold=#EAB308, silver=#9CA3AF, bronze=#C2410C, elm=#FF671F)
AdminDashboard.jsx: Client rows have data-testid='client-row-{id}' for testing
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration18_admin_dashboard.py - Created comprehensive test suite for admin dashboard endpoints
seed_data_creation: Using existing 4 client_profiles: 2 gold (149€ each), 2 silver (99€ each) = 496€ MRR. All status='activo'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified admin dashboard with real metrics. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/dashboard-stats (KPIs), GET /api/admin/upcoming-payments (7-day payments), GET /api/admin/dashboard (legacy). Frontend data-testids: admin-dashboard, kpi-row, kpi-total, kpi-active, kpi-risk, kpi-bajas, kpi-mrr, plan-distribution, upcoming-payments, client-list-compact, client-row-{id}. All 4 clients are active with status='activo'. MRR calculation: 2*149 + 2*99 = 496€. No upcoming payments because next_payment dates are in the past.
